channel.title: CivitasX Research
channel.description: Working maps, evidence standards, and public questions for the CivitasX civilizational path.

item.title: From Four Starting Points to a Civilizational Path
item.description: Why OrgAnchor, EchoEnginer, ProvisionLoop, and WillFlow belong in one theory of change; where the path is still broken; and what evidence could prove the current map wrong.
